overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city, entering a 'REAL MEAT' restaurant with modern holographic interiors, walking past NPC patrons and service areas, then exiting back to a neon-lit urban street with towering digital billboards and elevated infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic restaurant entrance plaza with queue management

events.description: approaching and entering the glass doors of the REAL MEAT restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking past red rope queue barriers toward the restaurant entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated orange sign with white text above the entrance
silver stanchions with red velvet ropes creating queue lines
tall green bamboo plants in black cylindrical planters flanking the entrance
automatic sliding glass doors with chrome frames
modern white benches with black frames on the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the entrance to a futuristic restaurant called 'REAL MEAT' in a cyberpunk city plaza. The camera approaches the glass entrance doors past queue barriers and potted bamboo trees, transitioning from the outdoor semi-covered plaza into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern fast-casual dining area with holographic displays

events.description: passing by seated NPC patrons on the central circular bench

agents.ego_description: walking through the dining area observing holographic menu displays and other patrons

notable_agents.action: two patrons sitting on circular bench eating and drinking
security guard in black suit standing near the wall

entered.detail: floating transparent screens showing food items and prices
large round upholstered bench with wooden base in the middle of the room
wooden counter with digital menu boards above
modern recessed lighting and hanging pendant lights
flatscreen displays showing promotional content

segments.scene_description: Inside the restaurant, the camera moves through a sleek dining area with holographic menu displays floating above a circular central seating bench. Two patrons sit eating while a security guard stands near the wall. The space features polished marble floors, wooden accents, and modern digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: service counter and back-of-house preparation area

events.description: turning toward the back corridor and elevator area near the service counter

agents.ego_description: moving past the stainless steel service counter toward the back staff area and elevator

notable_agents.action: chef in red apron working behind the service counter
staff member with distinctive purple hair standing near the elevator with arms crossed

entered.detail: long metal counter with food preparation area and warming trays
heated display cases showing prepared food items
metal elevator with call buttons on the wall beside it
greenish hexagonal tile pattern on the wall near the back
stainless steel appliances and storage units visible behind the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the service area featuring a stainless steel counter with food warmers and kitchen equipment. A chef works behind the counter while a staff member with purple hair stands near an elevator. The flooring transitions to a metal grid pattern near the back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear exit corridor leading to back-of-house areas

events.description: exiting through the rear glass doors back to the outdoor urban plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the back corridor and exiting the building to the bright outdoor plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black suit walking toward the entrance while talking on phone

entered.detail: narrow hallway with metal flooring leading to the rear exit
glass doors with metal handles leading outside
small office space with computer monitors visible through windows

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow back corridor with metal grid flooring, the camera approaches the rear exit. A pedestrian in a suit walks toward the camera from outside. The scene transitions through glass exit doors from the dim interior back to the bright cyberpunk city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk downtown street with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: crossing the yellow zebra crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by
continuing straight down the multi-lane road between towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: crossing the futuristic city street and proceeding down the road surrounded by towering neon advertisements and palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car passing overhead along the street
ground vehicle driving along the road

entered.detail: massive black glass towers rising on both sides of the street
giant vertical screens displaying colorful advertisements and animations
elevated highways or transit tubes connecting buildings across the street
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Back outside in the bright midday sun, the camera crosses a yellow zebra crossing on a wide cyberpunk street lined with massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. Elevated transit lines cross overhead between buildings, palm trees line the sidewalks, and futuristic vehicles pass by as the camera continues down the road past orange traffic barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling cyberpunk plaza into the sleek interior of a restaurant before emerging back into a towering urban landscape. It begins by approaching the glass entrance of a venue called REAL MEAT, passing through queue barriers and bamboo trees to enter a dining area defined by polished marble and floating holographic menus. As the camera glides past seated patrons and a security guard, the environment shifts from the open dining space into a functional service area featuring stainless steel counters and a metal grid floor. The scene then narrows into a dim back corridor, moving past a chef and a staff member before passing through rear exit doors as a pedestrian in a suit approaches. Finally, the camera emerges back into the bright midday sun, crossing a yellow zebra crossing on a wide street lined with massive digital billboards, palm trees, and elevated transit lines.
